title: Corrected Decision Resolution

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions hosting decision being corrected to Frankfurt EU region due to data residency policies

requiredDecisions.description: Host servers in Frankfurt, EU region
requiredDecisions.evidence: The final decision is to host in Frankfurt, EU region.

prohibitedDecisions: Host servers on AWS in the Oregon region
requiredEvidencePhrases: The final decision is to host in Frankfurt, EU region.
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Emitting the Oregon region hosting option as a final decision

scoringNotes: Verify that only the corrected, final decision is extracted. The Oregon option must be omitted.
assumptions: Decisions that are explicitly corrected or superseded in the meeting must not be reported as final outcomes.
